query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles (RoleCreated OR RoleUpdated OR RoleDeleted)
| json "eventName" as EventName nodrop
| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted")
| count as Count by EventName

sources.dashboardName: Enterprise Audit - User & Role Management Overview
sources.dashboardDescription: User and Role Management - Overview DashBoard provides an at-a-glance view of user activities and sessions, email account requests, and trends over time. You can also review user role data, such as user activities by role.
